AEMEATH_SYNC_POWER.title: Sync
AEMEATH_RESONANCE_POWER.title: Resonance
AEMEATH_FORM_POWER.title: Mech State
AEMEATH_DETUNE_POWER.title: Off Tune
AEMEATH_DETUNE_POWER.description: When this reaches its maximum, the target becomes Dissonant.
AEMEATH_DETUNE_CAP_DOWN_POWER.title: Off Tune Cap Down
AEMEATH_DETUNE_CAP_DOWN_POWER.descriptio: Reduces this target's Off Tune maximum.
AEMEATH_DETUNE_CAP_DOWN_POWER.smartDescr: Reduces this target's Off Tune maximum by {Amount} (minimum cap is 5).
AEMEATH_DISSONANCE_POWER.title: Dissonance
AEMEATH_DISSONANCE_POWER.description: At max Off Tune. Resonance Break will push it into Interference.
AEMEATH_DETUNE_IMMUNE_POWER.title: Off Tune Immune
AEMEATH_DETUNE_IMMUNE_POWER.description: Cannot gain Off Tune and cannot trigger Resonance Break.
AEMEATH_INTERFERENCE_POWER.title: Interference
AEMEATH_INTERFERENCE_POWER.description: Can still gain Off Tune and still trigger Resonance Break. Each stack gives -1 Strength. At enemy turn end, lose 1 stack and restore 1 Strength.
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_POWER.title: Fusion Burst
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_POWER.description: When this reaches its current maximum, it explodes automatically and damages all enemies.
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_CAP_POWER.title: Fusion Burst Cap Up
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_CAP_POWER.descripti: Increases this target's Fusion Burst maximum this combat.
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_CAP_POWER.smartDesc: Increase this target's Fusion Burst maximum by {Amount} this combat.
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_SUPPRESSED_POWER.de: This target will not automatically detonate Fusion Burst this turn.
AEMEATH_SELF_CHECK_POWER.title: Regeneration
AEMEATH_SELF_CHECK_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, heal HP and lose 1 stack.
AEMEATH_SELF_CHECK_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the end of your turn, heal {Amount} HP and lose 1 stack.
AEMEATH_CARD28_POWER.title: name28
AEMEATH_CARD28_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, gain 2 Sync.
AEMEATH_INTERFERENCE_FIELD_POWER.title: Interference Field
AEMEATH_INTERFERENCE_FIELD_POWER.descrip: At the start of your turn, apply Off Tune to all enemies.
AEMEATH_INTERFERENCE_FIELD_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your turn, apply {Amount} Off Tune to all enemies.
AEMEATH_RESONANCE_DEXTERITY_POWER.title: Resonance Dexterity
AEMEATH_RESONANCE_DEXTERITY_POWER.descri: At the start of your turn, spend 1 Resonance and gain 2 Dexterity.
AEMEATH_TOUCH_THE_STARS_POWER.title: Touch the Stars
AEMEATH_TOUCH_THE_STARS_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you play a card that spends Resonance, a random card in your hand costs 1 less Energy this turn.
AEMEATH_UNFINISHED_SONG_POWER.title: Unfinished Song
AEMEATH_UNFINISHED_SONG_POWER.descriptio: At the end of each of your turns, trigger Melt on all enemies.
AEMEATH_UNFINISHED_SONG_POWER.smartDescr: At the end of each of your turns, trigger Melt {Amount} time(s) on all enemies.
AEMEATH_UNDER_THE_MELTING_NIGHT_SKY_POWE: The Fusion Burst you apply is doubled, but whenever you successfully apply Fusion Burst, take 2 damage.
The Fusion Burst you apply is doubled, but whenever you successfully apply Fusion Burst, take 2 damage.
AEMEATH_SILENT_PROTECTION_POWER.title: Silent Protection
AEMEATH_SILENT_PROTECTION_POWER.descript: Whenever you apply Fusion Burst, gain Block.
AEMEATH_SILENT_PROTECTION_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you apply Fusion Burst, gain {Amount} Block.
AEMEATH_TO_SCULPT_THE_SILENCE_POWER.desc: Whenever Descend or Enstage triggers, gain Strength. Remove that Strength at end of turn.
AEMEATH_TO_SCULPT_THE_SILENCE_POWER.smar: Whenever Descend or Enstage triggers, gain {Amount} Strength. Remove that Strength at end of turn.
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_THE_STARS_POWER.title: Between the Stars
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_THE_STARS_POWER.descript: Whenever Descend triggers, gain 1 extra Resonance. Whenever Enstage triggers, draw extra cards.
AEMEATH_BETWEEN_THE_STARS_POWER.smartDes: Whenever Descend triggers, gain 1 extra Resonance. Whenever Enstage triggers, draw {Amount} extra cards.
AEMEATH_GRAVITY_DEPLOYMENT_POWER.title: Gravity Deployment
AEMEATH_GRAVITY_DEPLOYMENT_POWER.descrip: At the start of your turn, if any enemy is in Interference, gain 1 Resonance. You deal extra damage to enemies in Interference.
AEMEATH_GRAVITY_DEPLOYMENT_POWER.smartDe: At the start of your turn, if any enemy is in Interference, gain 1 Resonance. You deal +{Amount} damage to enemies in Interference.
AEMEATH_SYNC_NEXT_TURN_POWER.title: Async Cache
AEMEATH_SYNC_NEXT_TURN_POWER.description: At the start of your next turn, gain Sync.
AEMEATH_SYNC_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your next turn, gain {Amount} Sync.
AEMEATH_NO_SYNC_GAIN_THIS_TURN_POWER.des: You cannot gain Sync this turn.
AEMEATH_ENCORE_EXTRA_TURN_POWER.title: Encore
AEMEATH_ENCORE_EXTRA_TURN_POWER.descript: Take an extra turn after this one.
AEMEATH_ENCORE_PENDING_ENSTAGE_POWER.des: At the start of the extra turn, trigger Enstage again if possible.
AEMEATH_FIRST_CARD_DISCOUNT_POWER.title: First Card Discount
AEMEATH_FIRST_CARD_DISCOUNT_POWER.descri: Your next card costs less Energy this turn.
AEMEATH_REFRACTION_PENDING_VIGOR_POWER.d: If you don't take damage before your next turn starts, gain Vigor at the start of your next turn.
AEMEATH_REFRACTION_PENDING_VIGOR_POWER.s: If you don't take damage before your next turn starts, gain {Amount} Vigor at the start of your next turn.
AEMEATH_PROBABILITY_CLOUD_POWER.title: Probability Cloud
AEMEATH_PROBABILITY_CLOUD_POWER.descript: Until your next turn starts, you have a 50% chance to avoid incoming damage.
AEMEATH_PROBABILITY_CLOUD_POWER.smartDes: Until your next turn starts, you have a {Amount}% chance to avoid incoming damage.
AEMEATH_TARGET_LOCKED_POWER.title: Target Locked
AEMEATH_TARGET_LOCKED_POWER.description: Whenever you apply Off Tune, apply extra Off Tune.
AEMEATH_TARGET_LOCKED_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you apply Off Tune, apply {Amount} extra Off Tune.
AEMEATH_ECHO_POWER.title: Echo
AEMEATH_ECHO_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card, apply Fusion Burst to a random enemy.
AEMEATH_ECHO_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you play a card, apply {Amount} Fusion Burst to a random enemy.
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_TRAJECTORY_POWER.de: Each stack increases your Fusion Burst auto-burst damage by 1%.
AEMEATH_FUSION_BURST_TRAJECTORY_POWER.sm: Your Fusion Burst auto-burst damage is increased by {Amount}%.
AEMEATH_SPOTLIGHT_READY_POWER.title: Spotlight Ready
AEMEATH_SPOTLIGHT_READY_POWER.descriptio: Whenever you trigger Melt, draw cards.
AEMEATH_SPOTLIGHT_READY_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever you trigger Melt, draw {Amount} card(s).
AEMEATH_ELECTRONIC_SEA_POWER.title: Electronic Sea
AEMEATH_TUNDRA_TYRANT_POWER.title: Tundra Tyrant
AEMEATH_TUNDRA_TYRANT_POWER.description: Whenever Resonance Break triggers, apply Weak to that enemy.
AEMEATH_TUNDRA_TYRANT_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever Resonance Break triggers, apply {Amount} Weak to that enemy.
AEMEATH_WHEN_SNOW_MELTS_POWER.title: When Snow Melts
AEMEATH_WHEN_SNOW_MELTS_POWER.descriptio: Whenever Resonance Break triggers, draw cards.
AEMEATH_WHEN_SNOW_MELTS_POWER.smartDescr: Whenever Resonance Break triggers, draw {Amount} cards.
AEMEATH_CORE_CHRONICLE_POWER.title: Core Chronicle
AEMEATH_CORE_CHRONICLE_POWER.description: At the start of each turn, all enemies gain Fusion Burst cap and Fusion Burst, then add Burn to your discard pile.
AEMEATH_CORE_CHRONICLE_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of each turn, all enemies gain +{Amount}x6 Fusion Burst cap and {Amount}x6 Fusion Burst, then add {Amount} Burn to your discard pile.
AEMEATH_TWILIGHT_CHRONICLE_POWER.title: Twilight Chronicle
AEMEATH_TWILIGHT_CHRONICLE_POWER.descrip: For the rest of combat, Fusion Burst cannot auto-burst from reaching cap. At the start of each turn, draw cards. At end of turn, you may Exhaust cards from your hand.
AEMEATH_TWILIGHT_CHRONICLE_POWER.smartDe: For the rest of combat, Fusion Burst cannot auto-burst from reaching cap. At the start of each turn, draw {Amount} card(s). At end of turn, choose up to 3 cards in your hand and Exhaust them.
AEMEATH_VOID_CONTAMINATION_POWER.title: Void Contamination
AEMEATH_VOID_CONTAMINATION_POWER.descrip: At the start of each player turn, one of the following occurs: 30% gain 1 Intangible; 20% heal 10% HP; 10% lose 5% HP; 40% gain 1 Strength. Then lose 1 stack.
NAMELESS_EXPLORER_FLIGHT.title: Flight
NAMELESS_EXPLORER_FLIGHT.description: Takes half damage from attacks. Lose 1 stack when receiving damage. At the end of your turn, gain 2 Strength. Takes double damage from Melt and Fusion Burst detonations. When Resonance Break triggers, remove 3 extra stacks. If reduced to 0, become Dizzy.
NAMELESS_EXPLORER_FLIGHT.condensedDescri: Half damage from attacks. -1 on damage taken. +2 Str per turn. Double damage from Melt/Burst. -3 on Resonance Break. Dizzy at 0.
AEMEATH_QED_POWER.title: Q.E.D.
AEMEATH_QED_POWER.description: Haivixia's proof counter. At the threshold, remove all Q.E.D.; players gain Vulnerable and Weak, and Haivixia uses Final Proof next turn.
AEMEATH_HAIVIXIA_PROPHECY_POWER.title: Prophecy
AEMEATH_HAIVIXIA_PROPHECY_POWER.descript: Play your next three cards in Haivixia's predicted order. Complete it to gain 1 Energy; fail and Haivixia gains Q.E.D. and Strength. Draft satisfies any step.
AEMEATH_HAIVIXIA_PROPHECY_POWER.template: Haivixia predicts your next cards: Attack → Skill → Attack. Current step: {Next}; remaining: {Remaining}. Draft satisfies any step.
Haivixia predicts your next cards: Skill → Attack → Skill. Current step: {Next}; remaining: {Remaining}. Draft satisfies any step.
Haivixia predicts your next cards: Attack → Attack → Skill. Current step: {Next}; remaining: {Remaining}. Draft satisfies any step.
Haivixia predicts your next cards: Skill → Skill → Attack. Current step: {Next}; remaining: {Remaining}. Draft satisfies any step.
Haivixia predicts your next cards: Attack → Skill → Power. Current step: {Next}; remaining: {Remaining}. Draft satisfies any step.
Haivixia predicts your next cards: Skill → Attack → Power. Current step: {Next}; remaining: {Remaining}. Draft satisfies any step.
AEMEATH_DENIA_ENTROPY_SHIFT_POWER.title: Entropy Shift
AEMEATH_DENIA_ENTROPY_SHIFT_POWER.descri: Each stack increases damage dealt by 1. At higher thresholds, Denia's moves escalate. Every 3 times players attack Denia, remove 1 stack of Entropy Shift.
AEMEATH_DENIA_BLACK_HOLE_BIND_POWER.desc: Dragged by a singularity. For the next {Amount} turns, draw 1 fewer card each turn.
AEMEATH_DENIA_VOID_EROSION_POWER.title: Void Erosion
AEMEATH_DENIA_VOID_EROSION_POWER.descrip: At the end of turn, lose HP equal to its stacks, then lose 1 stack.
